tools.name: Elicit
tools.one_liner: AI research assistant that automates paper discovery, data extraction, and literature synthesis across 138M+ papers.
key_features: Search 138M+ papers and 545K clinical trials with natural language queries
Auto-extract structured data (sample size, methods, outcomes) into comparison tables
Generate comprehensive research reports with sentence-level citations
Systematic review workflow: screen up to 5,000 papers automatically
Real-time research alerts for new publications matching your interests
Chat with full-text papers and get AI-explained answers
tools.use_case: Ideal for conducting systematic reviews, building evidence matrices, and synthesizing findings across dozens of papers — tasks that traditionally take weeks can be completed in hours.
tools.how_to_use: 1. Enter a research question in natural language (e.g., 'What are the effects of theanine on cognitive function?'). 2. Elicit searches and ranks relevant papers. 3. Add columns to extract specific data points (sample size, methodology, outcomes). 4. Generate an automated research report with citations. 5. Export to RIS, CSV, BIB, or DOCX for your reference manager.

pricing_details.Basic (Free): 2 reports/month, unlimited search & summaries, chat with papers, Zotero import
pricing_details.Plus ($7/mo billed yearly): 4 reports/month, export to RIS/CSV/BIB/PDF/DOCX, clinical trials search, 5 table columns
pricing_details.Pro ($29/mo billed yearly): Systematic review workflow (5,000 papers), 12 reports/month, API access, 20 table columns, 10 research alerts
pricing_details.Scale ($49/mo billed yearly): Team collaboration, figure extraction, 20 reports/month, 200 data sources per report, admin panel
pricing_details.Enterprise (Custom): SSO/SAML, unlimited API, 40,000 paper screening, custom data sources, dedicated support

screenshots.caption: Research question interface with AI-suggested refinement tags
Screening recommendation with extracted supporting quotes
Library: organize sources with collections and tags
Research Alerts: stay updated with new relevant findings

tools.trusted_by: Used by 5M+ researchers including teams at top universities and pharmaceutical companies
